title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_worktree_add
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_worktree_add' MCP tool.

rootIndex.description: 0-based index into MCP roots; ignored if workspaceRoot set.

allWorkspaceRoots.description: Fan out across all MCP roots.

path.description: Filesystem path for the new worktree (relative paths resolved from git toplevel).

branch.description: Branch to check out; created from `baseRef` if it doesn't exist.

baseRef.description: Commit-ish to base the new branch on. Default: HEAD.
